title: Oden’s Sacrifice Sends the Scabbards to the Future
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Momonosuke, Hiyori, Kozuki Retainers, Unknown person #2, Toki as Oden’s execution and Toki’s final act send the Kozuki retainers toward the future and reveal how Wano’s tragedy endured.
scene: Oden’s execution and Toki’s final act send the Kozuki retainers toward the future and reveal how Wano’s tragedy endured.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: up you go"..." up you go--!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Stop it!, that's a little too high don't you think?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're looking up from this high in the sky after all.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I refuse to stop showing him this scenery!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Make sure you engrave this scene in your mind, as it something that even wano doesn't possess!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Momo! What type of girls do you like?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Momo, you have to think of humans as Chikuwa and cut them down in one fell swoop!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What the hell is that teaching style!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How was your trip? Did you happen to stop by on Zou by any chance?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I were to sum up our whole journey, then yes!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Zou and the Kozuki clan were historically very linked.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Put that in your head, guys!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When the time comes, we must go to zoo!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They will undoubtedly be of great help to you.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Lord Oden, what do you mean by "When the time comes"?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "When the time comes" is "when the time comes", right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's a beautiful piece, you will play it for my funeral.

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: Hey Momo, don't make your sister cry!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Oh, is that what I said? Sorry.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Kill what is left of the Kozuki clan!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Thank you so much for the swords, Shinobu!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Can I consider myself a Kozuki Vassal?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We all decided to become vassals without being invited!! It's for you to choose!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's like you were the V one who killed Lord Oden...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You are a bit disloyal to worry like that about what the enemies think!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wouldn't you be the spy about whom Kaido spoke, by any chance, dog?!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't help them, we don't have time!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Oden’s Fall and the Scabbards’ Future storyline with 58 dialogue beats. Oden’s execution and Toki’s final act send the Kozuki retainers toward the future and reveal how Wano’s tragedy endured.
